name: Gift of the Gem Dragon
description: You increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. When you take damage from a creature within 10 feet of you, you can use your reaction to emanate telekinetic energy. The creature must make a Strength saving throw (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + the ability modifier of the score increased by this feat). On a failed save, the creature takes 2d8 force damage and is pushed up to 10 feet away from you. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage and isn't pushed. You can use this reaction a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regaining all uses on a long rest.
